settings.title: Living Beautifully Since 1862
settings.description: From our village of Rilly-la-Montagne in the Montagne de Reims, we craft champagne for life's most beautiful moments.

settings.title: An Invitation to Celebrate
settings.description: Delicate red fruits and a fine, elegant mousse — the rosé that turns gatherings into lasting memories.

settings.title: The Art of Fine Champagne
settings.description: Citrus, brioche and white flowers, aged patiently in our cellars for remarkable depth and finesse.

settings.heading: Where We Belong
settings.body: Our château is a place of warm gatherings — where long tables, candlelight and good company turn an ordinary evening into a celebration. Hospitality has always been at the heart of who we are.

settings.heading: Celebrate in Good Company
settings.body: Founded on an entrepreneurial spirit and a belief in shared success, Champagne de Lossy has always been about community — raising a glass to the people and the moments that matter most.

settings.heading: A Gift to Life
settings.body: A glass of de Lossy elevates every moment to another level of joy and sophistication. It is the finishing touch to a life lived beautifully.

settings.heading: A Source of Enjoyment
settings.body: We tend our vines with respect for the land that gives so generously. Through sustainable winemaking and the conservation of nature, we protect the source of all our enjoyment.

settings.name: Cuvée Brut
settings.tasting_notes: Citrus, brioche and white flowers, with a fine and persistent mousse.

settings.name: Cuvée Rosé
settings.tasting_notes: Delicate red berries and rose petal, elegant and beautifully balanced.

settings.heading: Discover Our Champagne
settings.description: Two cuvées, crafted with the same patience and care that has defined our maison for over a century.

settings.title: Estate Grown
settings.text: Vines tended by hand in the Montagne de Reims.

settings.title: Hand-Crafted
settings.text: Vinified and aged patiently in our own cellars.

settings.title: Shipped in the USA
settings.text: Fulfilled by our licensed US shipping partner.

settings.title: 21+ Only
settings.text: You must be of legal drinking age to purchase.
